causal_map.relationship: raises demand for qualified HBM supply
causal_map.transmission: Accelerator deployments require high-bandwidth memory close to compute. As AI infrastructure capex expands, customers reserve qualified HBM capacity and intensify supplier qualification pressure.

causal_map.relationship: improves supplier mix and pricing power
causal_map.target: memory supplier revenue mix and profitability
causal_map.transmission: When qualified HBM demand outpaces available supply, bit allocation shifts toward higher-value AI memory products. That can lift supplier revenue mix, ASP resilience, and gross-margin contribution.

causal_map.source: higher HBM attach and stack complexity
causal_map.transmission: HBM value is realized through package-level integration with accelerators. Higher attach rates and stack complexity increase demand for interposers, CoWoS-like capacity, and packaging yield control.
